Testing Department Summary

Current state: end-to-end testing process from received work order through sign-off. The map shows Phase 1 module assembly, Phase 2 testing/final adjustments, and Phase 3 final testing/shipment readiness.

Non-value-added time required: Best: 4 hr 2 min / Worst: 7 hr 25 min.

Step 1: Retrieve & Inspect Modules

Phase 1 • Best: 10 min / Worst: 10 min

Scanner, Conveyor, and Chassis modules are retrieved and inspected before build-up.

Step 2: Assemble Conveyor & Chassis

Phase 1 • Best: 5 min / Worst: 10 min

Assemble the conveyor and chassis into a ready-to-test build state.

Step 3: Connect Scanner to Power & LAN

Phase 1 • Best: 10 min / Worst: 30 min

Connect scanner power and LAN, commission the account, and run/update as required.

Step 4: Record Serial Numbers

Phase 1 • Best: 5 min / Worst: 10 min

Record scanner, conveyor, and chassis serial numbers.

Step 5: Connect Extension Cables

Phase 1 • Best: 5 min / Worst: 10 min

Connect solenoid and conveyor motor extension cables from scanner to conveyor.

Step 6: Run Machine & Align Conveyor O-Rings

Phase 2 • Best: 10 min / Worst: 60 min

Run the machine and align conveyor O-rings.

Step 7: Check & Adjust Flapper Heights

Phase 2 • Best: 10 min / Worst: 60 min

Check and adjust flapper heights.

Step 8: Unplug Extension Cables

Phase 2 • Best: 5 min / Worst: 10 min

Unplug temporary extension cables and permanently connect scanner to modules.

Step 9: Piston Check

Phase 2 • Best: 60 min / Worst: 120 min

Run 500 cards to each bin across 12 bins.

Step 10: Run Sorts - 4 TCGs

Phase 3 • Best: 2 hr / Worst: 4 hr

Run sorts for Pokémon, Magic: The Gathering, Lorcana, and One Piece.

Step 11: Foil Detection Calibration

Phase 3 • Best: 45 min / Worst: 60 min

Calibrate foil detection using 100 non-foil and 100 foil cards.

Step 12: Run Foil Detection Sorts - 4 TCGs

Phase 3 • Best: 1 hr / Worst: 2 hr

Run foil-detection sorts for Pokémon, Magic: The Gathering, Lorcana, and One Piece.

Step 13: HiPot Conductivity Test

Phase 3 • Best: 5 min / Worst: 15 min

Perform HiPot / conductivity test.

Step 14: Power On & Verify Online

Phase 3 • Best: 10 min / Worst: 60 min

Power on, verify system online, and commission to next customer.

Value-Added Outcomes

  1. Test and validate all modules.
  2. Ensure quality and reliability.
  3. Document results and traceability.
  4. Confirm system meets customer requirements.
  5. Prepare for shipment.
